title: ANT'S Swamp Upgrade
description: 🐸 a fresh take on the vanilla swamp
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e317b43cc760926f083477d10593b6a84ac44c8b.png)
🍀**Upgrade Swamp** - Basically the idea for the biome redesign came from photos I took of a real swamp when I visited it a few years ago - essentially it's a small update done without any new blocks or items.

Major changes were made to the color palette of the biome and to its details, such as trees, grass density or dirt piles. However, I tried to maintain a vanilla feel.

This isn't a huge change per se, but rather a simplified and enjoyable way to update the vanilla biome and bring it up to par with the new biomes.

🪵P.s. please excuse me, English is not my native language so I could have made mistakes in the text. :)
